function.name: askQuestions
function.arguments: {"questions": [{"header": "Handoff scope", "question": "What should the customer handoff package emphasize for the VanArsdel POC?", "message": "Plan preview: after you confirm scope, I’ll invoke **QA** in deep-review mode, regenerate **DIAGRAM**s, package **DOCS**, and finally **REPO** will run the open-source/public-readiness checklist and prepare the handoff branch/tag/push.", "options": [{"label": "Standard handoff + open-source readiness", "description": "Validate current implementation, refresh diagrams/docs, and prepare for public release.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Handoff only", "description": "Package customer-facing docs and validation, but do not optimize for open-source/public release."}, {"label": "Open-source hardening focus", "description": "Prioritize public-readiness, repo hygiene, and removal of anything not suitable for public release."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Release visibility", "question": "Should I treat this as a public GitHub-ready release or a private customer handoff that is merely open-sourceable later?", "options": [{"label": "Public GitHub-ready now", "description": "Apply the stricter public-readiness bar now.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Private handoff, open-sourceable later", "description": "Prepare artifacts so it can be open-sourced later, but don’t optimize everything for immediate public release."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}, {"header": "Deliverables", "question": "Any must-have deliverables beyond validation, diagrams, docs, and repo hygiene?", "options": [{"label": "Use the standard package", "description": "README, deployment guide, architecture diagrams, validation summary, and release notes.", "recommended": true}, {"label": "Add demo/runbook materials", "description": "Include demo script, sample prompts/test cases, and operator runbook."}, {"label": "I’ll specify extras", "description": "Provide custom deliverables in freeform input."}], "allowFreeformInput": true}]}
